reviews.comment:
Muy buena estación de servicio en medio de la cordillera de los Andes!!! Todo muy rico!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent gas station in the middle of the Andes Mountains! Everything was delicious!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2psSlNHUk9iMkZFVDB0VlRHOXdRbU5rVkc0MVZtYxAB

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) Expensive hotel. The breakfast they say is included is just coffee and a tortilla. The Wi-Fi doesn't work in the room. The shower isn't hot, it's lukewarm to cold.

I DO NOT RECOMMEND IT. THERE ARE OTHERS IN THE CITY THAT PROVIDE BETTER SERVICE.

(Original)
Hotel caro
Café da manhã que dizem incluso e um café e uma tortilha
Internet wi-fi não funciona no quarto
Chuveiro não e quente fica morno pra frio

NAO INDICO TEM OUTROS NA CIDADE QUE NOS ACOLHEM MELHOR

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención, baños limpios, se puede pagar con tarjeta y billeteras como la app de ypf

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, clean restrooms, and payment options include credit cards and digital wallets like the YPF app.

reviews.comment:
La parada obligada antes/después de Chile. Muy buena atención en la confitería y gasolinera, baños en excelente estado. Hay WiFi,  se puede comer algo liviano, café, té,  sándwiches, golosinas. El personal es muy amable

(Translated by Google)
A must-stop before/after Chile. Excellent service at the café and gas station, and the restrooms are in great condition. There's Wi-Fi, and you can get light snacks, coffee, tea, sandwiches, and sweets. The staff is very friendly.

reviewReply.comment:
Buenas tardes

La esperamos nuevamente

Excellent! I came here for a coffee with milk and toast. Very good, as usual, a YPF.

reviews.comment:
En lo posible si no queres gastar de mas, ye aconsejo no comprar. Precios por las nubes. A la altura sobre el nivel del mar qué es donde están!

(Translated by Google)
If you don't want to overspend, I advise against buying. Prices are sky-high. Especially considering the altitude above sea level where they are!

reviews.comment:
Última opción para cargar combustible YPF antes del paso a Chile o primera al volver. Muy buena y cordial atención.

(Translated by Google)
Last option to fill up with YPF fuel before crossing into Chile, or first on the way back. Very good and friendly service.
